positive: A mesmerizing, symmetrical illustration featuring a stylized celestial forest scene. Large, luminous crescent moons hang amongst silhouetted flora—like stylized ferns, weeping willows, and mythical blooming flowers. The design should utilize bold, thick outlines and strong graphic contrast, reminiscent of retro Art Nouveau and tattoo flash art. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, ethereal cyan, burnt gold, and cream white. The composition must be centered and highly detailed, designed to wrap beautifully around a garment. Use a clean, vector-art aesthetic with gradient highlights only applied to light sources (stars, moons) to enhance depth, ensuring the overall look is perfect for single-color screen printing on fabric.
negative: blur, smudge, noise, grainy, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, blurry background, messy lines, bad anatomy, cartoon, photorealism, low detail, ugly, extra limbs, deformed, cropped
